name: P-Nut Butter Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream the butter and sugars together.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla to the mixture; stir until combined.
3. Incorporate the peanut butter into the mixture.
4. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt) and add them to the peanut butter mixture.
5. Refrigerate the cookie dough for 2 hours.
6. Form the dough into round balls.
7. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
8. Place the coated balls on a cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
10. As soon as they are removed from the oven, place a Hershey Kiss in the center of each cookie. This is a favorite among my grandchildren.
